content.text:

import weave
# Initialize Weave with the project
client = weave.init("sviluppo-ac/reward-modeling-v2")
print(f"Weave initialized: {client}")
print(f"Project: sviluppo-ac/reward-modeling-v2")
print("Connection successful!")
EOF
